Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: containers for exchange media [300215552], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: religious visual works [300234093], visual works by function [300191089], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Slotted boxes or other containers used, often in churches, for receiving offerings or donations. They may be portable, or fixed to a part of the building or a furnishing. Portable collection boxes typically have a handle used to pass around in order to collect donations.
Cajas ranuradas u otros recipientes usados, a menudo en iglesias, para recibir ofrendas o donaciones. Pueden ser portátiles, o estar fijas en una parte del edificio o en algún mobiliario.

Kistjes met een inwerpgleuf, of andere houders, die, meestal in kerken, worden gebruikt om offergaven of giften in te ontvangen. Ze kunnen draagbaar zijn of bevestigd aan een deel van het gebouw of het interieur.
Contenitore con un'impugnatura portato per la questua. È chiuso da un coperchio con una fenditura per introdurre le offerte.
Récipient muni d'une anse, porté pour faire la quête. Le tronc à quêter est fermé par un couvercle comportant une fente permettant d'y introduire l'argent donné.
有溝槽的盒子或其他容器，通常是教堂裡用於收取奉獻金或捐獻。包括手提式或固定於建築物或傢俱的一部分。

Term_Source.Page: Candidate term -- BHA -- 3/98; Candidate term -- CCA -- 12/95; collection boxes (furnishings); collection boxes (objects)
